name: War
tagline: Rally, direct, and empower allies in battle.

baseAbility.name: Totem / Rally
baseAbility.description: Totem: standard action, create a fixed-location aura (radius scales with CL) granting you and allies inside it a bonus; you start with a totem granting a scaling circumstance bonus to weapon damage. Rally: an immediate action usable on an ally within long range of one of your totems, letting them benefit from an effect right away; you start with a rally that lets you use aid another on them remotely. Lasts while you concentrate, or 1 SP for 1 round/CL without concentration.

talents.name: Totem of Courage (totem)
talents.description: New totem: allies gain a bonus to attack rolls and saves vs. fear.

talents.name: Totem of Doom (totem)
talents.description: New totem: enemies inside become shaken with no save.

talents.name: Totemic Aura
talents.description: Totems can be attached to a creature (including yourself) and move with it instead of staying fixed in place.

talents.name: Mandate (mandate)
talents.description: New ability type: create a mandate linking two allies who both benefit as long as they stay near each other.

talents.name: Momentum Pool (momentum)
talents.description: Gain a pool of momentum points allies can spend (instead of spell points) to activate your (momentum) talents.

talents.name: Suppressing Presence
talents.description: Enemies inside your totems can't heal naturally, and their fast healing/regeneration is halved.

talents.name: Ranged Totem
talents.description: Increase the range at which you can place or rally through your totems by one step. Repeatable.

talents.name: Swift Totem
talents.description: Create a totem or mandate as a move action instead of standard (or swift for an extra spell point).

talents.name: Mobile Totem
talents.description: Move an existing totem you created to a new location as a swift action.

talents.name: Marked Enemy
talents.description: Designate a creature type; that type takes a penalty to saves against your totems.
